description: A compact summary of an instance and derived inventory facts

isBoundWith.description: Whether any holdings for the instance are part of a bound-with relationship

recordCounts.description: Counts that allow consumers to apply their own suppression policy

instance.description: Counts and suppression facts for the instance record

suppressedFromDiscovery.description: Whether the instance record is suppressed from discovery

holdings.description: Counts for holdings records associated with the instance

items.description: Counts for item records associated with the instance

total.description: Total number of item records associated with the instance

suppressedFromDiscovery.description: Number of item records directly suppressed from discovery

suppressedByHoldings.description: Number of item records associated with holdings suppressed from discovery

suppressedFromDiscoveryOrByHoldings.description: Number of item records directly suppressed from discovery or associated with suppressed holdings

notSuppressedFromDiscovery.description: Number of item records not directly suppressed from discovery and not associated with suppressed holdings

aggregates.description: Aggregate facts for all records and for records not suppressed from discovery

allRecords.description: Aggregate facts calculated from all holdings and item records

notSuppressedFromDiscoveryRecords.description: Aggregate facts calculated from holdings and item records not suppressed from discovery

referenceValues.description: Instance-level reference values useful to consumers

instanceFormats.description: Instance format reference values for the instance

modeOfIssuance.description: Mode of issuance reference value for the instance

natureOfContentTerms.description: Nature of content term reference values for the instance

instanceType.description: Instance type reference value for the instance

total.description: Total number of records in this category

suppressedFromDiscovery.description: Number of records in this category suppressed from discovery

notSuppressedFromDiscovery.description: Number of records in this category not suppressed from discovery

itemDerivedFields.description: Fields derived from item records without returning item rows

effectiveShelvingOrder.description: First item effective shelving order in this aggregate scope, if available

electronicAccess.description: Deduplicated electronic access entries from the instance, holdings, and items

referenceValues.description: Reference values derived from records in this aggregate scope

itemMaterialTypes.description: Material type reference values represented by items in this aggregate scope
